commands.description: Fetch current weather data for a location

commands.command:
import requests
response = requests.get('https://weather-ydn-yql.media.yahoo.com/forecastrss?location=sunnyvale,ca&format=json', headers={'Authorization': 'Bearer YOUR_TOKEN'})
data = response.json()

POST /ws/mail/v1/sendEmail
Host: api.mail.yahoo.com
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN
Content-Type: application/json

{
  "to": "recipient@example.com",
  "subject": "Hello from Yahoo API",
  "body": "This is a test email."
}

Host: api.mail.yahoo.com
Authorization: Bearer YOUR_ACCESS_TOKEN
